title: Delegates & Bindings
description: Master Unreal delegates: Single-cast, Multi-cast, and Dynamic delegates for event-driven gameplay architectures.
learningObjectives: Differentiate Single-cast, Multi-cast, and Dynamic delegates
Declare custom delegate structures using Unreal Engine macros
Bind functions and execute delegates dynamically to trigger gameplay events

sections.title: Decoupled Event Handling via Delegates
sections.content:
Unreal Engine uses Delegates to implement event-driven architectures. They are type-safe function pointers:

1. **Single-cast**: Binds to only one function. Returns value.
2. **Multi-cast**: Binds to multiple functions. Executed sequentially. No return values.
3. **Dynamic**: Can be serialized and exposed to Blueprint graph editors (slower call cost).

sections.title: Exposing Dynamic Multi-cast Delegates
